quotes.verbatim_quote:
As you shall see in the examples to follow there are many ways to use these Symetric
Cycles other than straight up and down in minor thirds.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Defines the pedagogical scope of the lesson — symmetric cycles are not limited to linear minor-third motion.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
Practice these variations and commit them to memory. Try using them in introductions
and endings in any songs you know.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Method's core directive for applying the symmetric-cycle material to real musical contexts.

quotes.verbatim_quote: This is Ex. 33 in Broken Chords played backwards.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Defines the constructive technique for Ex. 34 — retrograde application of a previous exercise.
